content:
Hello! Very new to the game! I was drawn to the art so really looking forward to getting into this~ I already read Flare’s doc but I still dont have a lot of the units in sample teams. Would love suggestions please~ 

Currently I have been using Tawil as my dps and Caecus/Goliath/Tulu, but maybe I don’t have enough dupes yet? It doesn’t always feel smooth to play and I’m stuck around chapter 5 right now. 

(I would love if i could hse Doresain/Helot Catena along with Tawil but I assume hard to lol. Maybe for d tide but I dont have enough units to try yet I guess)

Welcome your recommendations! ☺️
